name: Htipiti Tirosalata (Whipped Cheese Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tsouskes are hot, spicy peppers. The best are green long peppers from Macedonia.
2. Fry the peppers in oil and peel their skin.
3. Chop them into small pieces. The spiciness depends on your preference.
4. Cut about 1 pound of feta cheese into small pieces.
5. Mix the feta with the chopped peppers.
6. Add 3 tablespoons of olive oil to the mixture.
7. Work all ingredients together with a fork until it forms a paste.
8. Serve with bread or crackers as an appetizer.
